ideation: This animation sequence depicts a looping motion, representing the continuous nature of a loop or cycle.  The arms will move in a circular pattern, mimicking the shape of the emoji. We will use a 4-frame animation to capture the key moments of this circular movement. The movement is somewhat abstract and doesn't have an exact real-world equivalent, so we'll use the robot's arm capabilities to best approximate a looping motion.  Both arms will mirror each other's movements, creating a visually balanced animation.  The wrists will remain relatively neutral to avoid distraction from the main circular arm motion.  The key is to create a sense of continuous flow, even though the animation is composed of discrete frames.

frames.beat: arms begin at rest, poised for motion
both arms sweep upward and outward in a smooth arc
arms return to the center, completing half a loop
arms sweep downward and outward, finishing the loop
